blockingIssues.description: RotateKeyset screen test assertion mismatch: test expects text "02a3f8...8f2c" that the feature commit did not render, making verification unreliable.
RotateDistributionCompleteScreen routes Finish Distribution to "/" instead of Dashboard, violating VAL-ROTATEKS-007 happy-path destination.
RotateShare Local Share Updated screen routes "Return to Signer" to "/" instead of Dashboard, violating VAL-ROTATESH-004/005.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify or enforce the test-first requirement: either require explicit failing-test-first evidence in transcripts and accurate skillFeedback, or relax the procedure to match accepted workflow.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Three reviews observed implementation edits before test edits while handoffs reported followedProcedure=true (create-generation-progress, rotate-keyset-completion, rotate-share-flow).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit icon guidance to match architecture docs (prefer lucide-react over inline SVG for consistency), or state approved exceptions.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: create-generation-progress review found inline SVG in GenerationProgressScreen while architecture guidance says icons should come from lucide-react.

rejectedObservations.observation: Clarify AGENTS token usage because feature added raw color literals.
Update .factory/library/architecture.md route table for rotate-share/rotate-keyset immediately.
